title: x-openapi-flow
description: JSON Schema for the x-openapi-flow OpenAPI extension, defining resource lifecycle states and transitions.

version.description: Version of the x-openapi-flow schema contract used by this definition.

id.description: Unique identifier for this flow definition.

current_state.description: The state that the resource is in when this operation is invoked or returns.

description.description: Human-readable description of this flow step.

terminal.description: Marks this operation as terminal in the lifecycle.

header.description: HTTP header name used to carry the idempotency key.

required.description: Whether the idempotency header is mandatory.

transitions.description: List of possible state transitions from current_state.

transition_id.description: Stable transition identifier for traceability and testing.

from_state.description: Explicit transition source state. Defaults to parent current_state when omitted.

target_state.description: The state the resource moves to after a successful transition.

condition.description: Human-readable condition under which this transition occurs.

decision_rule.description: Machine-readable condition used to evaluate transition eligibility.

trigger_type.description: Mechanism that triggers the state transition.

operation_role.description: Role hint for orchestration and AI interpretation.

transition_priority.description: Priority used to disambiguate transitions when multiple paths are valid.

next_operation_id.description: operationId usually called to apply the next state transition.

prerequisite_operation_ids.description: operationIds that are expected to have happened before this transition.

prerequisite_field_refs.description: Field references required before this transition. Format: operationId:request.body.field, operationId:request.path.paramName, or operationId:response.<status>.body.field

propagated_field_refs.description: Field references produced/propagated for downstream flows. Format: operationId:request.body.field, operationId:request.path.paramName, or operationId:response.<status>.body.field

evidence_refs.description: Field references that prove transition completion.

failure_paths.description: Explicit non-happy-path outcomes for this transition.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the failure path.

target_state.description: State reached when this failure path is taken.

next_operation_id.description: Operation usually called next after this failure path.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum wait time before transition timeout.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for async transition checks.
